title: eleocharis braunii
intro: Eleocharis braunii, also known as Braun's spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's rhizomes and roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, providing health benefits like relieving coughs and congestion. Eleocharis braunii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory well-being.
